---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Who is affected and how often?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be specific — what would the user see or do differently?

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider? Why is your proposal better?

## Additional Context

Any mockups, references, or related issues.
